project.name: New_Project
project.description: Modern workspace project for UML, GUI and quantum modeling.

pages.name: Home

components.content: What is the purpose of the certificate?
A residence certificate confirms that you are officially registered at your current address. It may be required for administrative procedures, school registration, or employment-related documents.
This service is available to all residents registered in the municipality.
You'll need a valid identity card, the proof of address, and the complicated application form.
You'll need to submit the form and copies of the requested documents to your local public service building. Once ready, you'll be prompted to pick up your certificate.
The request is usually processed within 2 to 3 working days.
This is an official government page.

intent_jtmr4apyg_mm9b38u1.name: OpeningHours
intent_jtmr4apyg_mm9b38u1.intent_description: Asking for the opening hours of the public service.

intentBody_06wxt0vga_mm9b38u1.name: how do i submit my request?

intentBody_14tgxxf1f_mm9b38u1.name: how do i request the residency certificate?

intent_zuidaui0x_mm9b38u1.name: Contact
intent_zuidaui0x_mm9b38u1.intent_description: Requesting to speak with a human assistant.

intentBody_9kmxc6vnq_mm9b38u1.name: I need to speak to someone

body_wybm5pc31_mm9b38u1.name: How can I assist you today?

body_a8ph8sxrt_mm9b38u1.name: Our opening hours are Monday–Friday 9 AM–6 PM.

body_38x5jthwr_mm9b38u1.name: To obtain your residency certificate, you need to follow these 3 steps.

body_0yl3shkws_mm9b38u1.name: 1. On the page, download the residency certificate request form.

b533e6a5-cc51-4f0d-a269-98bf81a02c31.name: 2. Fill it out and print it. You also need to append certain additional documents, which are described in the form.

7c8e27fb-8cce-4f3d-9cc4-19ef5a963b8a.name: 3. You can then bring the filled out form to our offices or send it by mail.

body_b6vkku4r1_mm9b38u1.name: You can contact a worker at state@official.com or call +1 555-123-4567.

body_8i8n5kbs0_mm9b38u1.name: They will get back to you shortly.

e3aad61a-89b4-46a6-8c16-6f80b861d717.name: Welcome to our public services page! I am a digital assistant there to answer questions!

ac1415fb-e18d-4255-8dd1-c8dd6751d27d.name: OpeningHours
ac1415fb-e18d-4255-8dd1-c8dd6751d27d.intent_description: Asking for the opening hours of the public service.

044acc88-ca51-4536-9532-6117ab7d9a12.name: Comment puis-je demander le certificat de résidence ?

c4398ebe-b0ff-4d3d-83f6-b8754260730b.name: Contact
c4398ebe-b0ff-4d3d-83f6-b8754260730b.intent_description: Requesting to speak with a human assistant.

1f6e72c6-e8e0-444a-bd3d-0e9030ffe8fa.name: J’ai besoin de parler à quelqu’un

25196ccd-f1a5-4bb1-8a05-66cea3911582.name: Bienvenue sur notre page des services publics. Je suis un assistant numérique pour répondre à vos questions.

322748ce-abed-465c-97e8-01f035d7a0a7.name: Nos horaires d’ouverture sont du lundi au vendredi, de 9 h à 18 h.

45618109-32ae-408e-9065-a8e8455cfc8e.name: Nous sommes fermés le samedi et le dimanche.

1532cee5-04f7-4d74-ba6b-79cb9875e980.name: Pour obtenir votre certificat de résidence, vous devez suivre ces trois étapes.

fdc95d84-b0ae-4f83-811d-6c63c5f05f1e.name: 1. Sur cette page, téléchargez le formulaire de demande de certificat de résidence.

5e72e631-553c-4b4d-a3cd-4531a9b6efc2.name: 2. Remplissez-le et imprimez-le. Vous devez aussi joindre certains documents demandés dans le formulaire.

3de81a41-b1c8-4ab0-8567-c1dc878f9d1f.name: 3. Vous pouvez ensuite apporter le formulaire rempli à nos bureaux ou l’envoyer par courrier.

323d1e2a-cfce-492d-a173-541391de72c9.name: Vous pouvez contacter un agent à l’adresse state@official.com ou appeler le +1 555-123-4567.

05216eb5-8073-41e3-b7a8-fb51b99e3706.name: Ils vous répondront le plus vite possible.

body_wybm5pc31_mm9b38u1.name: How can I assist you today?

body_a8ph8sxrt_mm9b38u1.name: Our opening hours are Monday–Friday 9 AM–6 PM.

body_38x5jthwr_mm9b38u1.name: To obtain your residency certificate, you need to follow these 3 steps.

body_0yl3shkws_mm9b38u1.name: 1. On the page, download the residency certificate request form.

b533e6a5-cc51-4f0d-a269-98bf81a02c31.name: 2. Fill it out and print it. You also need to append certain additional documents, which are described in the form.

7c8e27fb-8cce-4f3d-9cc4-19ef5a963b8a.name: 3. You can then bring the filled out form to our offices or send it by mail.

body_b6vkku4r1_mm9b38u1.name: You can contact a worker at state@official.com or call +1 555-123-4567.

body_8i8n5kbs0_mm9b38u1.name: They will get back to you shortly.
